meta.author_line_en: A student initiative · Sultan Qaboos University
meta.aim_ar: أهلاً بك! نحن طلاب من جامعة السلطان قابوس، وجمعنا لك كل ما تحتاجه لمراجعة إنجليزي الصف الثاني عشر في مكان واحد: مفردات كل محور مع أمثلة، وشرح مبسّط للقواعد، وعبارات جاهزة تنفعك في الكتابة، ونماذج إجابات من امتحانات سابقة. تدرّب على كل قسم على حدة، ثم جرّب امتحاناً تجريبياً كاملاً يحاكي اليوم الحقيقي. هدفنا بسيط: أن تصل إلى الامتحان واثقاً وجاهزاً. نراجع معاً خطوة بخطوة.
meta.aim_en: A student initiative from SQU — one goal: get you to the exam feeling ready and confident. Every part of the paper has its own practice corner.

skills.desc_ar: نصوص قصيرة وجمل تقرّر إذا كانت صح أو خطأ حسب النص.
قصة أو مقالة ثم أسئلة إجابة قصيرة واختيار من متعدد.
اختر الكلمة الصحيحة التي تكمّل الجملة.
حوارات وفراغات: الأفعال الناقصة، الكلام المنقول، used to وغيرها.
فقرة كاملة فيها فراغات، تختار الأنسب لكل فراغ.
نماذج جاهزة + قائمة مراجعة تضمن أنك ما تنسى شي.

themes.blurb_ar: عن الصحافة، المشاهير، الخصوصية، وأخلاقيات الإعلام. ركّز على الكلام المنقول وصفات ed/ing.

vocab.ex: The match was broadcast live on TV.
The headlines were about the storm.
Celebrities have a right to privacy.

grammar.intro_ar: عندما ننقل كلام شخص آخر، نُرجِع الفعل خطوة إلى الوراء (backshift)، ونغيّر الضمائر وكلمات الزمن. في السؤال المنقول: لا توجد علامة استفهام، ويصبح الفعل خبرياً (الفاعل قبل الفعل).

points.en: tomorrow → the next day, now → then
Verbs: say, tell, ask, explain, suggest, promise

examples.en: "I like tennis." → He said (that) he liked tennis.
"Do you like tennis?" → He asked me if I liked tennis.
"Where do you live?" → She asked where I lived.
"I will call you tomorrow." → He said he would call me the next day.
examples.ar: قال إنه سيتصل بي اليوم التالي

grammar.intro_ar: الفرق بسيط: -ed توصف شعور الشخص، و -ing توصف الشيء أو الموقف الذي سبّب الشعور.

examples.en: I was bored. / The movie was boring.
I was confused. / The instructions were confusing.

grammar.intro_ar: بدل ما تقول very + صفة عادية، في صفة وحدة قوية تعطي نفس المعنى. مفيدة جداً في العناوين والكتابة.

examples.en: The fans were furious about the result.

functional.note_ar: عبارات جاهزة تستخدمها في الحوار: تقاطع، أو تسمح، أو تطلب أن تكمّل كلامك.

phrases.en: Can I interrupt you for a second?
No problem. / Yes, all right. / Go ahead.
Hold on! Let me finish, please.

writing.prompt_ar: اكتب/ي خبراً إعلامياً عن حدث حقيقي أو متخيّل وقع في منطقتك مؤخراً.
writing.model_en:
Local Students Organize Successful Beach Clean-Up

On Saturday, March 15th, over fifty students from our school organized a beach clean-up at the beach near Al Jubail Park in Sohar. The event began at 8 a.m. and continued until midday. The students collected more than 100 bags of plastic waste, old fishing nets, and other rubbish that had accumulated on the shore.

The idea was started by a group of Grade 12 students who were concerned about the damage to marine life caused by plastic pollution. Local businesses supported the event by providing gloves and bags. The Royal Oman Police also helped by ensuring the students' safety near the water.

This event is newsworthy because it shows how young people can take responsibility for their environment. The students hope to make this a monthly activity.
tips_ar: ابدأ بـ What/Who/Where/When في أول فقرة.

writing.prompt_ar: قرأت مقالاً عن تصرّفات الباباراتزي مع المشاهير. اكتب رسالة للمحرّر تعبّر عن رأيك.
writing.model_en:
Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing in response to your recent article about paparazzi photographers and their treatment of celebrities.

In my view, the behavior of some paparazzi is completely unacceptable. As far as I'm concerned, celebrities have the same right to privacy as ordinary citizens. They should be able to go shopping, eat at restaurants, or spend time with their families without being followed and photographed constantly.

However, I also believe that celebrities benefit from media attention for their work. Without journalists and photographers, the public would not know about their projects. The way I see it, there should be clear rules about when and where photography is allowed.

I strongly believe that respect for privacy should always come first.

Yours faithfully,
Sultan
tips_ar: ابدأ بـ Dear Sir/Madam واختم بـ Yours faithfully.
وضّح رأيك بعبارات: In my view / As far as I'm concerned.
اعرض الرأي المعاكس بـ However ثم ردّ عليه.

themes.blurb_ar: عن الوظائف، المقابلات، والمؤهلات. ركّز على الأفعال الناقصة وقواعد اللواحق.

vocab.ex: She is building a career in medicine.
A degree is essential for this job.
I enclose my CV with this letter.

grammar.intro_ar: كل modal له وظيفة: واجب قوي، نصيحة، ضرورة، أو منع. انتبه للفرق بين mustn't (ممنوع) و needn't (غير ضروري).
اللاحقة تغيّر نوع الكلمة. انتبه: الكلمات التي تنتهي بـ -y تتحوّل لـ -i قبل اللاحقة.
بعض الأفعال بعدها to + فعل، وبعضها بعدها ing، وبعضها يقبل الاثنين.

points.en: Infinitive only: decide, promise, plan, hope
Gerund only: enjoy, avoid, practise, suggest, consider
Both: start, begin, like, continue, stop, try

functional.note_ar: عبارات تجعل الطرف الآخر يقتنع برأيك أو يفعل شيئاً.

phrases.en: Wouldn't that be a good thing?

functional.note_ar: عبارات توصف المتطلّبات: الأساسي، المفضّل، وما تحتاجه مستقبلاً.

writing.prompt_ar: اكتب نصاً إعلامياً يصف مهنة تهمّك.
writing.model_en:
A Career as a Marine Biologist in Oman

Marine biology is a fascinating career that involves studying plants and animals living in the ocean. Marine biologists research different species, monitor their populations, and work to protect them from threats like pollution and overfishing.

To be successful in this career, a person should have an investigative personality type. They need to be curious, patient, and good at solving problems. Excellent communication skills are also essential because marine biologists often need to write reports and educate the public.

Regarding qualifications, a university degree in marine biology or a related science is essential. For more advanced positions, a master's degree or PhD is usually required. Practical experience, such as volunteering with organizations like the Environment Society of Oman, is also very desirable.

This career is ideal for someone who loves the ocean and wants to contribute to protecting Oman's rich marine environment for future generations.

writing.prompt_ar: تقدّم لوظيفة معلنة (مثل باحث تلفزيوني). اكتب رسالة تعريفية ترفقها مع سيرتك الذاتية.
writing.model_en:
Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing to apply for the position of TV Researcher which was advertised in the Oman Daily on 10th April.

I am currently a Grade 12 student at Suhar Secondary School and will graduate this June. I have always been fascinated by television production and I regularly watch documentaries about Omani history and culture. I am a curious and creative person with excellent computer skills. I am also a good team player, which I believe is essential for working in a media environment.

As my CV shows, I have experience using video editing software and I helped produce a short film for a school project last year. I am a hardworking and reliable person who is ready to learn new skills.

I would welcome the opportunity to attend an interview at your convenience. I have attached my CV for your consideration.

Yours faithfully,
Ali Saif

themes.blurb_ar: عن أسلوب الحياة الصحي، الكوارث الطبيعية، والسلامة. ركّز على الفرق بين الحقيقة والرأي وحروف الجر.

vocab.ex: A sedentary lifestyle is bad for health.
Families had to evacuate their homes.
Services were restored within a month.

grammar.intro_ar: بعض الأفعال والصفات ترتبط بحرف جر ثابت يجب حفظه معها. ويأتي بعد حرف الجر دائماً فعل + ing.

points.en: good at, interested in, afraid of
points.ar: جيد في، مهتم ب، خائف من

examples.en: We look forward to meeting you.

grammar.intro_ar: الحقيقة شيء يمكن إثباته، والرأي وجهة نظر. الأفعال think/feel/believe تدل على رأي.

examples.en: Opinion: I think exercise is fun.

grammar.intro_ar: مقدمة ← حجج مع أمثلة ← خاتمة. استخدم جملة مفتاحية لكل فقرة + روابط.

points.en: Cohesive devices: firstly, in addition, as a result, however, finally

functional.note_ar: بدايات جمل تجعل رأيك يظهر واضحاً وقوياً.

phrases.en: I think that… / In my view…

writing.prompt_ar: اختر كارثة طبيعية واكتب عنها نصاً إعلامياً.
writing.model_en:
Cyclone Gonu was the strongest tropical cyclone on record to hit the Arabian Peninsula. It struck the coast of Oman on 5th June 2007, bringing enormous waves, heavy rain, and winds of up to 260 kilometers per hour.

The cyclone caused widespread destruction, particularly in the coastal regions of Muscat and Sur. Entire neighborhoods were flooded, roads were damaged, and thousands of people had to evacuate their homes. Tragically, over 70 people lost their lives, and the economic damage was estimated at nearly OMR 1.5 billion.

The Omani government responded quickly by providing emergency aid, including food, water, and shelter. The Royal Oman Police and the armed forces played a crucial role in rescue operations. The public also showed great community spirit, with volunteers helping to clean up and support affected families. Most essential services were restored within a month, demonstrating Oman's ability to recover from such disasters.
tips_ar: عرّف الكارثة: وين ومتى وكم كانت قوية.

writing.prompt_ar: قريبك الصغير يقضي وقته داخلاً ويأكل أكل غير صحي. اكتب رسالة تقنعه بأسلوب حياة أصح.
writing.model_en:
My dearest cousin Khalid,

I hope you are doing well. I'm writing this letter because I'm a little worried about you. Your mother told me that you spend most of your free time playing computer games and eating snacks.

As far as I'm concerned, spending too much time indoors is not good for your health. I really think that you should try to be more active. Why don't you come and play football with me and my friends on Friday at the beach? It's great fun and a brilliant way to get exercise without even noticing it!

I also heard that you've been eating a lot of fast food. Personally speaking, I know it tastes good, but it's not healthy if you eat it every day. It contains too much fat and salt. I honestly believe that you would have more energy and feel much better if you ate more fresh fruit and vegetables.

I'm not trying to tell you what to do, Khalid. I just care about you and want you to be healthy and happy. Please think about it.

Lots of love,
Your cousin,
Fatma
tips_ar: استخدم عبارات الإقناع: Why don't you…? You should…

themes.blurb_ar: عن المواطنة، التطوّع، والقيم. ركّز على used to وتراكيب الأفعال مع الأسماء.

vocab.ex: Dar al'Atta'a is an Omani NGO.
Students donated clothes to those in need.
She dedicated her life to teaching.

grammar.intro_ar: نستخدم used to للعادة أو الشيء الذي كان يحدث في الماضي ثم انتهى. انتبه: في النفي والسؤال تصبح use to (بدون d).

examples.en: I used to live in Dubai.
I didn't use to like coffee.
Did you use to play football?

grammar.intro_ar: كلمات تجي مع بعض دائماً في سياق المواطنة. احفظها كوحدة وحدة.

examples.en: We should dedicate our time to serving our community.
examples.ar: يجب أن نكرّس وقتنا لخدمة مجتمعنا

examples.en: The government is working to eradicate poverty.

grammar.intro_ar: كي تصبح كتابتك مترابطة: كرّر الكلمات المفتاحية، استخدم ضمائر وروابط.

examples.ar: … التطوّع. علاوة على ذلك، يبني الشخصية

functional.note_ar: جمل جاهزة تعبّر بها عن موقفك تجاه المواطنة والوطن.

phrases.en: I think it's my responsibility to…

writing.title_en: A Profile of a Model Citizen
writing.prompt_ar: اكتب نصاً إعلامياً عن شخص تعتبره مواطناً مثالياً.
writing.model_en:
A model citizen in my community is my uncle, Rashid Al-Hashmi, who has been a primary school teacher for over twenty years. He works in a small village school in the mountains and has dedicated his life to educating children.

Every day, he travels an hour to reach the school because he believes that every child deserves a good education. He doesn't just teach lessons from textbooks; he also inspires his students to be proud of their country and to respect others. He often organizes weekend activities where children learn about Omani traditions and help clean up the village.

In addition to his teaching, Uncle Rashid volunteers with a local charity that provides school supplies to children from low-income families. He donates both his time and his money to help others.

To me, Uncle Rashid represents the best of Omani values: dedication, generosity, and a commitment to building a better community.
tips_ar: استخدم تراكيب مثل dedicate / donate / inspire.

writing.prompt_ar: قرّرت تتطوّع في إحدى الجمعيات العمانية (دار العطاء). اكتب إيميل لصديقك تخبره بقرارك.
writing.model_en:
Hi Hamad,

Hope you're well! I wanted to tell you some exciting news. I've decided to volunteer for Dar al'Ata'a during the summer holidays!

You probably know that they help poor families all over Oman. They used to set up tents during Ramadan to distribute Iftar meals, but now they run many different programmes. They provide food, help with education costs, and support families who are struggling.

I'm going to help with their food distribution programme. I feel it's my duty as an Omani citizen to give something back to my community. I really think that even small acts of kindness can make a big difference to someone's life.

Would you be interested in joining me? It would be much more fun if we volunteered together. We could go to the orientation meeting next week. Let me know what you think!

Speak soon,
Yousuf
tips_ar: لاحظ استخدام used to للعادة القديمة.

questions.prompt: A career as a press photographer can be very ____ because you have to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines.
questions.explanation_ar: demanding = يتطلّب جهداً وضغط. الجملة تتكلّم عن ضغط ومواعيد ضيقة، فالجواب demanding.

questions.prompt: Many young people today have a ____ lifestyle, spending hours sitting in front of computers.
questions.explanation_ar: sedentary = خامل / قليل الحركة. باقي الكلمات تعني نشيط وصحي، وهي عكس الجلوس الطويل.

questions.prompt: To protect children, medicines should be locked away in a safe place, out of ____.
questions.explanation_ar: out of reach = بعيد عن المتناول. هي التركيب الثابت مع medicines.

questions.prompt: Responsible citizens have a ____ to obey the law and respect the rights of others.
questions.explanation_ar: duty = واجب / مسؤولية. المواطن المسؤول عليه واجب، ليس هواية أو خياراً.

questions.prompt: A natural disaster such as a cyclone can cause widespread ____ to homes and infrastructure.
questions.explanation_ar: damage = أضرار. الكوارث تسبّب دماراً، لا منفعةً أو تحسيناً.

questions.prompt: The diver was ____ when she saw the shipwreck for the first time.
questions.explanation_ar: astonished = مذهول (صفة قوية للدهشة). رؤية شيء مبهر تجعلك astonished.

questions.prompt: Some paparazzi are very ____, following celebrities even into private places.
questions.explanation_ar: intrusive = متطفّل / مزعج. ملاحقة الناس في خصوصياتهم تصرّف intrusive.

questions.prompt: Before the interview, make sure your ____ matches the job requirements.
questions.explanation_ar: CV = السيرة الذاتية، وهي التي توضّح مؤهلاتك للوظيفة.

questions.prompt: Good ____ skills are essential because you must explain your ideas clearly to others.
questions.explanation_ar: communication skills = مهارات التواصل، وهي المرتبطة بشرح الأفكار بوضوح.

questions.prompt: She is a ____ employee who always finishes her work quickly and correctly.
questions.explanation_ar: efficient = كفؤ / فعّال. ينجز بسرعة ودقّة.

questions.prompt: Eating too much ____ food, high in fat and salt, can lead to obesity.
questions.explanation_ar: processed food = طعام مُصنّع، غالباً عالي بالدهون والملح.

questions.prompt: When the cyclone approached, thousands of families had to ____ their homes.
questions.explanation_ar: evacuate = يُخلي. عند الخطر تترك البيوت لمكان آمن.

questions.prompt: Dar al'Atta'a is an Omani ____ that helps poor families across the country.
questions.explanation_ar: NGO = منظمة غير حكومية، وهي وصف دار العطاء.

questions.prompt: Volunteers ____ their free time to help others without any payment.
questions.explanation_ar: dedicate = يكرّس. المتطوّع يكرّس وقته لمساعدة الغير.

questions.prompt: Her inspiring story ____ many young people to start volunteering.
questions.explanation_ar: inspire = يلهِم. القصص الملهِمة تحفّز الناس.

questions.prompt: The journalist always checks her ____ before publishing a story.
questions.explanation_ar: source = مصدر. الصحفي يتأكّد من مصدر الخبر.

questions.prompt: It was a ____ accident in which several people lost their lives.
questions.explanation_ar: tragic = مأساوي (صفة قوية لـ sad). مناسبة لحادث فيه وفيات.

questions.prompt: Doing ____ exercise three times a week strengthens your muscles and heart.
questions.explanation_ar: regular exercise = تمارين منتظمة، وهي التي تقوّي الجسم.

questions.prompt: Please ____ your CV with the application form.
questions.explanation_ar: enclose = يُرفِق. ترفق السيرة الذاتية مع الاستمارة.

questions.prompt: Omanis are famous for being ____, always welcoming guests with coffee and dates.
questions.explanation_ar: hospitable = مِضياف / كريم في استقبال الضيوف.

questions.prompt: Journalists must always check their ____ before publishing a story.
questions.explanation_ar: source = مصدر المعلومة، ويجب التأكد منه قبل النشر.

questions.prompt: The newspaper printed a shocking ____ on its front page.
Live matches are ____ on television to millions of viewers.
A fair reporter tries to avoid ____ and stay neutral.
The government was accused of ____ the news to hide the truth.
The story received wide media ____ across the country.
Press photographers must meet tight ____ to publish on time.
The magazine interviewed a famous ____ about her new film.
You should ____ for the job before the closing date.
Strong communication ____ are important in any career.
She was offered a ____ to a higher position after two years.
During the ____, the manager asked about my experience.
He earns a good monthly ____ at the company.
A strong CV lists your ____ and work experience.
My ____ at work helped me finish the project on time.
A headache can be an early ____ of illness.
Washing your hands regularly helps to ____ disease.
Wearing a helmet reduces the risk of head ____.
Good personal ____ keeps the body clean and healthy.
In an ____, call the ambulance immediately.
After resting for a week, he began to ____ from his illness.
The doctor gave the patient the right ____ for his condition.
A balanced ____ is essential for good health.
Many students ____ their free time to help the community.
Every citizen has both rights and ____.
We should protect the ____ by reducing pollution.
The ____ organized a campaign to clean the beach.
Giving to ____ helps people in need.
Voting is an important ____ of every citizen.
Respecting the law keeps ____ safe and orderly.

sets.intro_ar: اقرأ كل نص صغير ثم قرّر: الجملة صح أو خطأ؟ الجواب دائماً من النص نفسه.

items.passage_en: A career as a press photographer can be exciting and rewarding. You get to travel and meet interesting people. However, the job also involves unsocial hours, including evenings and weekends. You must be able to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines.
items.prompt: Press photographers always work normal office hours from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m.
items.explanation_ar: خطأ. النص يقول العمل فيه unsocial hours تشمل المساءات وعطلات نهاية الأسبوع.

items.passage_en: To be a good journalist, you need excellent communication skills. You must be curious about the world and enjoy meeting people. You also need strong writing skills to present your stories clearly.
items.prompt: Good communication skills are not important for a journalist.
items.explanation_ar: خطأ. النص يقول بالضبط إنك تحتاج excellent communication skills.

items.passage_en: Cyclone Gonu struck the coast of Oman in June 2007. It was the strongest tropical cyclone ever recorded in the Arabian Sea. The storm caused widespread flooding and damage, particularly in Muscat and Sur.
items.prompt: Cyclone Gonu caused damage only in the city of Salalah.
items.explanation_ar: خطأ. النص يذكر أن الأضرار كانت particularly in Muscat and Sur، وليست صلالة.

items.passage_en: Many young people today have a sedentary lifestyle. They spend hours sitting in front of computers or watching television. This lack of physical activity is one of the main causes of obesity.
items.prompt: A sedentary lifestyle involves sitting for long periods and not doing much exercise.
items.explanation_ar: صح. النص يصف sedentary lifestyle بالجلوس الطويل وقلة النشاط.

items.passage_en: Dar al'Atta'a is an Omani NGO that helps poor families. It runs several programmes, including Family Welfare and Education Care. During Ramadan, it distributes Iftar meals to those in need.
items.prompt: Dar al'Atta'a is a government organization that only provides medical care.
items.explanation_ar: خطأ. هي NGO (غير حكومية)، وتقدّم برامج رعاية وتعليم، وليست طبية فقط.

items.passage_en: When applying for a job, it is essential to read the advertisement carefully. You should check whether the job requirements match your skills. If they ask for a CV and a covering letter, make sure you send both documents.
items.prompt: It is important to send a CV and a covering letter only if the advertisement asks for them.
items.explanation_ar: صح. النص ينصح بإرسال الوثيقتين “if they ask for” أي إذا طلبوهما.

items.passage_en: Oman has very strong moral and cultural values. Citizens have a responsibility to uphold these values and to respect others. Being a good citizen also means contributing to the local community.
items.prompt: A responsible Omani citizen should respect others and help improve their community.
items.explanation_ar: صح. النص يذكر أن على المواطن احترام الغير والمساهمة في مجتمعه.

sets.intro_ar: نفس الفكرة: اقرأ النص، ثم صح أو خطأ. لا تعتمد على معلوماتك العامة، فقط النص.

items.passage_en: Freelance journalists do not have one employer. They sell their stories to different newspapers and magazines. This gives them freedom, but it can also be stressful because their income is not always stable.
items.prompt: Freelance journalists always work for a single newspaper.
items.explanation_ar: خطأ. freelance يعني يعمل لحسابه ويبيع لعدّة جهات.

items.passage_en: Regular exercise has many benefits. It strengthens the heart, improves mood, and helps prevent diseases such as diabetes. Doctors recommend at least thirty minutes of activity most days.
items.prompt: Regular exercise can help prevent diseases like diabetes.
items.explanation_ar: صح. النص يذكر أنها helps prevent diseases such as diabetes.

items.passage_en: A covering letter should be short and formal. It introduces you and explains why you are suitable for the job. You should always attach your CV with it.
items.prompt: A covering letter should be long and informal.
items.explanation_ar: خطأ. النص يقول short and formal (قصيرة ورسمية).

items.passage_en: Volunteering is a great way to give back to the community. Volunteers do not receive money, but they gain valuable experience and the satisfaction of helping others.
items.prompt: Volunteers are usually paid a high salary for their work.
items.explanation_ar: خطأ. النص يقول do not receive money.

items.passage_en: The Royal Oman Police played a crucial role during Cyclone Gonu. They helped families evacuate and took part in rescue operations, saving many lives.
items.prompt: The Royal Oman Police helped in rescue operations during Cyclone Gonu.
items.explanation_ar: صح. النص يذكر مشاركتهم في rescue operations.

sets.intro_ar: اقرأ القصة بتركيز ثم أجب. في Task 1 الإجابة قصيرة (4 كلمات أو أقل).
sets.passage_en:
One Friday afternoon, two cousins, Ahmed and Salim, decided to go fishing. They were both seventeen years old and had been best friends since childhood. They took their small fishing boat from the shore near a quiet village in Muscat. The sea was calm and peaceful, and the sky was a perfect blue. They were both looking forward to a relaxing afternoon.

They motored out to a spot they knew, about a kilometre from the shore, where the fish were plentiful. For an hour, they had great success, catching several large fish. "This is the best day ever!" laughed Salim. "Let's stay a little longer," suggested Ahmed. "The fishing is too good to stop now."

However, when they finally decided to head home, disaster struck. Ahmed tried to start the engine, but nothing happened. He tried again and again, but it was no use. "It's broken!" he shouted. Salim looked towards the shore. "I don't know," he replied quietly, "but look at those clouds over the mountains."

Dark storm clouds were gathering quickly on the horizon. The wind began to pick up, and the calm sea started to become rough. The small boat began to drift away from the shore, pulled by a strong current. The boys were terrified. They had no engine, no phone, and no way to call for help.

Fortunately, a police boat was patrolling the area. An officer named Rashid was scanning the sea with his binoculars. He noticed the small boat being tossed by the waves far from shore. "That boat is in trouble! Speed up!" he shouted.

The police boat raced across the water. When they reached the boys, they threw them a strong rope. Ahmed and Salim were soaking wet and frightened, but they were safe. The police towed their small boat back to the shore. Ahmed and Salim promised never to go out in the boat again without checking the weather forecast first.

items.prompt: Where did Ahmed and Salim decide to go fishing?
items.explanation_ar: من الفقرة الأولى: from the shore near a quiet village in Muscat.

items.prompt: Why did they want to stay longer at the fishing spot?
items.explanation_ar: أحمد قال the fishing is too good to stop now.

items.prompt: What happened when they tried to start the engine?
items.explanation_ar: جرّب المحرّك وما اشتغل — صرخ “It's broken!”

items.prompt: What began to gather on the horizon?
items.explanation_ar: Dark storm clouds were gathering on the horizon.

items.prompt: Who spotted the boys from the police boat?
items.explanation_ar: الضابط Rashid هو الذي لاحظهم بالمنظار.

items.prompt: What did the police throw to the boys to rescue them?
items.explanation_ar: رموا لهم a strong rope.

items.prompt: At the beginning of the story, the sea was described as:
items.explanation_ar: في البداية: The sea was calm and peaceful.

items.prompt: The boys were unable to call for help because:
options: They did not have a phone with them.
Their phone had fallen in the water.
There was no signal at sea.
items.explanation_ar: النص يقول they had no engine, no phone — أصلاً ما عندهم جوّال.

items.prompt: How did the police officer first notice the boys were in trouble?
options: He heard them shouting for help.
He saw their boat with his binoculars.
items.explanation_ar: Rashid was scanning the sea with his binoculars ولاحظ القارب.

items.prompt: What lesson did the boys learn?
options: Always catch as many fish as possible.
Never go fishing on a Friday.
Always check the weather forecast before going out to sea.
items.explanation_ar: وعدوا أن لا يخرجوا دون التحقق من الطقس.

sets.intro_ar: اقرأ القصة ثم أجب. الإجابة القصيرة دائماً من النص.
sets.passage_en:
Last summer, Mariam decided to spend her holiday differently. Instead of staying at home, she signed up to volunteer with a local charity that helped elderly people in her neighbourhood. At first, she felt a little nervous, but the other volunteers were friendly and made her feel welcome.

Every morning, Mariam visited two or three elderly people. She helped them with their shopping, read them stories, and simply kept them company. One woman, Aunt Zainab, looked forward to Mariam's visits the most. She used to live alone and rarely spoke to anyone for days.

By the end of the summer, Mariam realised that she had gained far more than she had given. She had learned patience, made new friends, and felt proud to be helping her community. She decided to continue volunteering every weekend during the school year.

items.prompt: Who did the charity help?
items.explanation_ar: الجمعية ساعدت elderly people.

items.prompt: How did Mariam feel at first?
items.explanation_ar: النص: she felt a little nervous.

items.prompt: Who looked forward to Mariam's visits the most?
items.explanation_ar: Aunt Zainab كانت تنتظر زياراتها.

items.prompt: What did Mariam learn by the end of the summer?
options: That volunteering is a waste of time.
That she had gained more than she had given.
That she preferred staying at home.
items.explanation_ar: النص: she had gained far more than she had given.

items.prompt: What did Mariam decide to do during the school year?
items.explanation_ar: قرّرت continue volunteering every weekend.

sets.intro_ar: اقرأ الحوار واختر الصحيح لكل فراغ. ركّز على الأفعال الناقصة وزمن الجملة.
sets.passage_en:
Salim is being interviewed by Mr Ali for a part-time job at a sports centre.

Mr Ali: Good morning, Salim. Thank you for coming. I can see from your CV that you (1) ____ some experience working with children.
Salim: Yes, that's right. Last summer I helped at a football camp.
Mr Ali: Excellent. And what do you (2) ____ to study at university?
Salim: I (3) ____ go to lectures, but I want to study Sports Science.
Mr Ali: Good. Now, in this job you (4) ____ be late, because the children arrive at exactly 4 p.m.
Salim: Of course. I understand. I think I (5) ____ ask my brother to give me a lift to be sure.
Mr Ali: That sounds sensible. Welcome to the team!

items.prompt: Gap (1): I can see you ____ some experience.
items.explanation_ar: الفاعل you يأخذ have (ليس has).

items.prompt: Gap (2): What do you ____ to study?
items.explanation_ar: بعد do الفعل يبقى في صيغته الأساسية: do you plan.

items.prompt: Gap (3): I ____ go to lectures (it's a past habit).
items.explanation_ar: للعادة الماضية نستخدم used to.

items.prompt: Gap (4): You ____ be late (it is forbidden).
items.explanation_ar: mustn't = ممنوع. الأطفال يصلون في الوقت المحدد، فالتأخّر ممنوع. (don't have to/needn't تعني غير ضروري — عكس المعنى).

items.prompt: Gap (5): I think I ____ ask my brother for a lift.
items.explanation_ar: should = نصيحة/فكرة جيدة، وهي الأنسب هنا.

sets.intro_ar: حوار آخر للتدريب: كلام منقول، gerund/infinitive، used to، وأفعال ناقصة.
sets.passage_en:
Two friends, Huda and Maha, are talking after school.

Huda: You look tired. What's wrong?
Maha: My little brother kept (1) ____ me last night while I was studying.
Huda: Oh no. Did you tell your mother?
Maha: Yes. She told me that she (2) ____ talk to him.
Huda: Good. By the way, I (3) ____ play the piano when I was young, but I stopped.
Maha: Really? You ____ (4) start again — it's a wonderful hobby.
Huda: Maybe. I'd love (5) ____ how to play properly one day.

items.prompt: Gap (1): My brother kept ____ me.
items.explanation_ar: بعد keep يجي الفعل + ing: keep interrupting.

items.prompt: Gap (2): She told me that she ____ talk to him (reported, future).
items.explanation_ar: في الكلام المنقول will تصبح would.

items.prompt: Gap (3): I ____ play the piano when I was young.
items.explanation_ar: عادة ماضية انتهت: used to.

items.prompt: Gap (4): You ____ start again (advice).
items.explanation_ar: نصيحة ودّية: should.

items.prompt: Gap (5): I'd love ____ how to play.
items.explanation_ar: بعد would love يجي to + فعل: to learn.

sets.intro_ar: فقرة فيها فراغات. اختر الكلمة الأنسب لكل فراغ حسب المعنى.
sets.passage_en: In June 2007, Cyclone Gonu hit the coast of Oman, causing terrible (1) ____ to homes and roads. The authorities acted quickly and told thousands of people to (2) ____ their homes and move to safer areas. Emergency (3) ____, such as food and clean water, was given to those affected. Many volunteers were (4) ____ in the clean-up operation that followed. Within weeks, most essential services had been (5) ____, and life slowly returned to normal.

items.prompt: Gap (1)
items.explanation_ar: damage = أضرار، وهي التي تسبّبها الأعاصير.

items.prompt: Gap (2)
items.explanation_ar: evacuate = يُخلي، يناسب الانتقال لمكان آمن.

items.prompt: Gap (3)
items.explanation_ar: emergency aid = إسعافات/مساعدات طارئة (طعام وماء).

items.prompt: Gap (4)
items.explanation_ar: be involved in = مشارك في. المتطوّعون شاركوا في التنظيف.

items.prompt: Gap (5)
items.explanation_ar: restored = أُعيدت للعمل، يناسب رجوع الخدمات.

sets.intro_ar: نفس الفكرة: اختر الكلمة الأنسب لكل فراغ.
sets.passage_en: Living a healthy life is not difficult. First, you should eat a balanced (1) ____ with plenty of fruit and vegetables. Second, try to do (2) ____ exercise, such as walking or swimming, for at least thirty minutes a day. This helps to (3) ____ your muscles and keep your heart strong. You should also avoid too much (4) ____ food, which is high in fat and sugar. Finally, getting enough sleep is (5) ____ for both your body and your mind.

items.prompt: Gap (1)
items.explanation_ar: balanced diet = نظام غذائي متوازن.

items.prompt: Gap (2)
items.explanation_ar: regular exercise = تمارين منتظمة.

items.prompt: Gap (3)
items.explanation_ar: strengthen muscles = يقوّي العضلات.

items.prompt: Gap (4)
items.explanation_ar: processed food = طعام مصنّع (دهون وسكريات).

items.prompt: Gap (5)
items.explanation_ar: vital = حيوي/ضروري جداً للجسم والعقل.

sets.intro_ar: اقرأ كل فقرة ثم قرّر إن كانت العبارة صحيحة أم خاطئة.

items.passage_en: Online newspapers update their stories many times a day. Readers can comment and share articles instantly.
items.prompt: Online newspapers are updated only once a week.
items.explanation_ar: خطأ. النص يقول إنها تُحدَّث عدة مرات في اليوم.

items.passage_en: A balanced diet includes fruit, vegetables and enough water. Doctors say it helps the body fight illness.
items.prompt: A balanced diet helps the body fight illness.
items.explanation_ar: صحيح، النص يذكر أنه يساعد الجسم على مقاومة المرض.

items.passage_en: Volunteers cleaned the beach last weekend. They collected more than fifty bags of plastic.
items.prompt: The volunteers collected fewer than ten bags of plastic.
items.explanation_ar: خطأ، جمعوا أكثر من خمسين كيساً.

items.passage_en: To apply for the job, candidates must send a CV and attend an interview.
items.prompt: Candidates only need to send a CV to get the job.
items.explanation_ar: خطأ، يجب أيضاً حضور مقابلة.

items.passage_en: Wearing a seatbelt saves lives, and it is required by law in Oman.
items.prompt: Wearing a seatbelt is required by law in Oman.
items.explanation_ar: صحيح حسب النص.

items.passage_en: The journalist protected the identity of her source and refused to reveal the name.
items.prompt: The journalist revealed the name of her source.
items.explanation_ar: خطأ، رفضت الكشف عن الاسم.

items.passage_en: Regular exercise strengthens the heart and improves mood. Experts recommend thirty minutes a day.
items.prompt: Experts recommend thirty minutes of exercise a day.
items.explanation_ar: صحيح كما ورد في النص.

items.passage_en: The charity provides free education to children in poor areas and depends on donations.
items.prompt: The charity charges children for education.
items.explanation_ar: خطأ، التعليم مجاني ويعتمد على التبرّعات.

items.passage_en: During the storm, the authorities told people to leave the coast, and many families moved to safer areas.
items.prompt: People were told to stay near the coast during the storm.
items.explanation_ar: خطأ، طُلب منهم مغادرة الساحل.

items.passage_en: A good employee is punctual and works well in a team, and managers value reliability.
items.prompt: Managers value reliability in their employees.
items.explanation_ar: صحيح كما ورد في النص.

items.passage_en: Recycling reduces waste and protects the environment, so many schools now have recycling bins.
items.prompt: Recycling increases the amount of waste.
items.explanation_ar: خطأ، التدوير يقلّل النفايات.

items.passage_en: The news channel apologized for broadcasting incorrect information and promised to check facts carefully.
items.prompt: The news channel promised to check its facts more carefully.
items.explanation_ar: صحيح كما ورد في النص.

sets.intro_ar: حوار قصير عن رحلة مدرسية: أفعال ناقصة وكلام منقول. اختر الإجابة الصحيحة لكل فراغ.
sets.passage_en:
Sara is talking to her teacher about a school trip.

Teacher: You (1) ____ bring a permission letter from your parents.
Sara: I asked my father, and he said he (2) ____ sign it tonight.
Teacher: You (3) ____ forget your water bottle; it will be hot.
Sara: Don't worry. He also told me that I (4) ____ take a hat.
Teacher: Good. If you feel tired, you (5) ____ rest in the shade.

items.prompt: Gap (1): You ____ bring a permission letter.
items.explanation_ar: must + مصدر للتعبير عن الالتزام.

items.prompt: Gap (2): he said he ____ sign it tonight.
items.explanation_ar: في الكلام المنقول تتحوّل will إلى would.

items.prompt: Gap (3): You ____ forget your water bottle.
items.explanation_ar: mustn't = ممنوع/يجب ألّا.

items.prompt: Gap (4): he told me that I ____ take a hat.
items.explanation_ar: should للنصيحة، ولا تتغيّر في الكلام المنقول.

items.prompt: Gap (5): you ____ rest in the shade.
items.explanation_ar: can + مصدر للقدرة/الإمكانية.

sets.intro_ar: حوار عن خطط العمل: التمييز بين gerund و infinitive. اختر الصيغة الصحيحة.
sets.passage_en:
Ali is discussing his career plans with a friend.

Ali: I enjoy (1) ____ with computers, so I decided (2) ____ ICT at college.
Friend: That's great. Do you want (3) ____ abroad later?
Ali: Maybe. I'm interested in (4) ____ new skills, and I look forward to (5) ____ a good job.

items.prompt: Gap (1): I enjoy ____ with computers.
items.explanation_ar: بعد enjoy نستخدم gerund (فعل + ing).

items.prompt: Gap (2): I decided ____ ICT.
items.explanation_ar: بعد decided نستخدم infinitive (to + فعل).

items.prompt: Gap (3): Do you want ____ abroad?
items.explanation_ar: بعد want نستخدم infinitive.

items.prompt: Gap (4): I'm interested in ____ new skills.
items.explanation_ar: بعد حرف الجر in نستخدم gerund.

items.prompt: Gap (5): I look forward to ____ a good job.
items.explanation_ar: في look forward to تكون to حرف جر فيتبعها gerund.

sets.intro_ar: حوار عن الماضي: used to والسؤال في الماضي. اختر الإجابة الصحيحة.
sets.passage_en:
A student is talking to his grandfather about the past.

Grandfather: When I was young, I (1) ____ walk to school every day.
Student: Really? (2) ____ you play any sport?
Grandfather: Yes. I (3) ____ to swim in the sea. We didn't (4) ____ have cars.
Student: Life (5) ____ very different then.

items.prompt: Gap (1): I ____ walk to school every day.
items.explanation_ar: used to للعادة في الماضي.

items.prompt: Gap (2): ____ you play any sport?
items.explanation_ar: السؤال في الماضي يبدأ بـ Did + مصدر.

items.prompt: Gap (3): I ____ to swim in the sea.
items.explanation_ar: used to في الإثبات.

items.prompt: Gap (4): We didn't ____ have cars.
items.explanation_ar: بعد didn't تصبح use to بدون d.

items.prompt: Gap (5): Life ____ very different then.
items.explanation_ar: الفاعل المفرد Life يأخذ was في الماضي.

sets.intro_ar: نص بفراغات عن دور الصحافة. اختر الكلمة المناسبة لكل فراغ.
sets.passage_en: Newspapers play an important (1) ____ in society. They (2) ____ people about local and world events. A good journalist always checks the (3) ____ of information before publishing. However, readers should be (4) ____ of fake news, which spreads quickly online. Reading from trusted sources helps us form a balanced (5) ____.

items.prompt: Gap (1)
items.explanation_ar: play a role = يلعب دوراً.

items.prompt: Gap (2)
items.explanation_ar: inform = يُعلِم/يُخبر.

items.prompt: Gap (3)
items.explanation_ar: source = مصدر المعلومة.

items.prompt: Gap (4)
items.explanation_ar: be aware of = على دراية/حذر من.

items.prompt: Gap (5)
items.explanation_ar: form an opinion = يكوّن رأياً.

sets.intro_ar: نص بفراغات عن الصحة. اختر الكلمة المناسبة لكل فراغ.
sets.passage_en: Staying healthy is not difficult. First, eat a balanced (1) ____ with plenty of vegetables. Second, (2) ____ regularly to keep your heart strong. You should also get enough (3) ____ at night so your body can rest. Washing your hands often helps to (4) ____ disease. Finally, see a doctor if you notice any unusual (5) ____.

items.prompt: Gap (1)
items.explanation_ar: balanced diet = نظام غذائي متوازن.

items.prompt: Gap (2)
items.explanation_ar: exercise = يمارس الرياضة.

items.prompt: Gap (3)
items.explanation_ar: get enough sleep = ينال قسطاً كافياً من النوم.

items.prompt: Gap (4)
items.explanation_ar: prevent disease = يقي من المرض.

items.prompt: Gap (5)
items.explanation_ar: symptoms = أعراض.

sets.intro_ar: نص بفراغات عن المواطنة. اختر الكلمة المناسبة لكل فراغ.
sets.passage_en: Being a good citizen means caring about your (1) ____. We can help by (2) ____ our time to those in need. Protecting the (3) ____ is also important, so we should reduce pollution and recycle. Every person has rights, but also (4) ____ towards others. By working together, we can build a stronger (5) ____.

items.prompt: Gap (1)
items.explanation_ar: community = المجتمع المحلي.

items.prompt: Gap (2)
items.explanation_ar: بعد by نستخدم gerond: giving our time = منح وقتنا.

items.prompt: Gap (3)
items.explanation_ar: environment = البيئة.

items.prompt: Gap (4)
items.explanation_ar: responsibilities = مسؤوليات.

items.prompt: Gap (5)
items.explanation_ar: society = المجتمع.
